I have completed the autonomous research workflow:
• Implemented analysis code in code/analyze_complex.py that:
• Parses the FKBP12 protein PDB and FK506 ligand SDF.
• Computes and saves protein Cα coordinates and distance matrices.
• Computes ligand geometry (radius of gyration, element composition).
• Computes per-residue minimum distance to the ligand.
• Runs a toy diffusion-style denoising trajectory on ligand coordinates and
• images/ligand_pca_scatter.png: PCA projection of ligand coordinates
• images/ligand_diffusion_rmsd.png: RMSD over steps for the toy diffusion
• Wrote the full research report to report/report.md, describing:
• A unified SE(3)-equivariant diffusion architecture for proteins, nucleic
• Prototype analysis on the 2L3R–FK506 complex using the generated figures.
• Training/inference strategies, limitations, and future directions.
